# CWE-342 safe — Predictable Exact Value from Previous Values (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-342-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"encoding/binary"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type GormDB struct{}

func (db *GormDB) Updates(values interface{}) error { return nil }

func SendLoginOTP(c *GinCtx, db *GormDB) error {
	var code uint32
	if err := binary.Read(rand.Reader, binary.BigEndian, &code); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return db.Updates(map[string]interface{}{"email": c.Request.PostFormValue("email"), "otp": code})
}
